problem id: d5071155
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) AND NOT SHL(3)

examples:
  10110110 -> 00001101
  00111011 -> 00000110
  00011101 -> 00000111
  01000000 -> 00010000
  00001010 -> 10000010
  00010010 -> 00000100
  11011011 -> 00100110
  01101000 -> 00011010
  00011011 -> 00000110

query: 01010010
predicted answer: 00000100
